# ToolNinja

> ToolNinja is a free, browser-only developer toolbox at toolninja.io.
> 39 tools that run 100% client-side — no login, no server calls, no tracking.
> Your data never leaves your browser. Ever.
> Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Why ToolNinja

- Zero friction: no account, no login, no sign-up required
- Privacy first: everything runs in the browser, nothing sent to servers
- Fast: instant results, no page reloads
- Free: all 39 tools are completely free, forever
- Offline capable: works without internet after first load

## Tools by Category

### Format
- JSON Formatter & Validator: https://toolninja.io/tools/json-formatter
  Format, validate, minify and pretty print JSON. Includes tree view and JSONPath query.
- Markdown Preview: https://toolninja.io/tools/markdown-preview
  Live markdown editor and renderer with GitHub Flavored Markdown support.
- SQL Formatter: https://toolninja.io/tools/sql-formatter
  Format and beautify SQL queries. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, T-SQL.
- HTML Formatter: https://toolninja.io/tools/html-formatter
  Format, beautify and minify HTML code instantly.

### Encode / Decode
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder: https://toolninja.io/tools/base64
  Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings. Supports Base64URL.
- URL Encoder/Decoder: https://toolninja.io/tools/url-encoder
  Percent-encode and decode URLs and query strings.
- JWT Decoder: https://toolninja.io/tools/jwt-decoder
  Decode and inspect JSON Web Token header, payload and signature. Token never leaves browser.
- Hash Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/hash-generator
  Generate MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512 hashes using WebCrypto API.
- HTML Entity Encoder: https://toolninja.io/tools/html-entity
  Encode and decode HTML entities and special characters.
- Image to Base64: https://toolninja.io/tools/image-to-base64
  Convert images to Base64 data URIs. No upload to server.
- JWT Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/jwt-generator
  Create and sign JSON Web Tokens with HMAC-SHA256 via WebCrypto.

### Generate
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/lorem-ipsum
  Generate placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences or words.
- Password Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/password-generator
  Generate strong random passwords with custom rules and strength indicator.
- UUID Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/uuid-generator
  Generate random UUID v4 identifiers. Bulk generation up to 100 at once.
- JSON to TypeScript: https://toolninja.io/tools/json-to-typescript
  Convert JSON to TypeScript interfaces and type definitions instantly.
- QR Code Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/qr-code-generator
  Generate QR codes for URLs, text and more. Download as PNG.
- Git Command Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/git-command-generator
  Describe what you want to do in plain English — get the exact git command.
- Markdown Table Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/markdown-table-generator
  Build tables visually and export as Markdown or HTML.
- Meta Tags Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/meta-tags-generator
  Generate Open Graph, Twitter Card and SEO meta tags with live social preview.

### Convert
- Color Converter: https://toolninja.io/tools/color-converter
  Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL color formats with live color picker.
- Timestamp Converter: https://toolninja.io/tools/timestamp-converter
  Convert Unix timestamps to human readable dates and vice versa.
- Number Base Converter: https://toolninja.io/tools/number-base-converter
  Convert between binary, decimal, hexadecimal and octal.
- String Case Converter: https://toolninja.io/tools/string-case-converter
  Convert between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, PascalCase and more.
- JSON to YAML Converter: https://toolninja.io/tools/json-yaml
  Convert between JSON and YAML formats with validation.
- CIDR / Subnet Calculator: https://toolninja.io/tools/cidr-calculator
  Calculate subnet masks, IP ranges and network addresses from CIDR notation.

### Test
- Regex Tester: https://toolninja.io/tools/regex-tester
  Test regular expressions with live match highlighting, capture groups table,
  replace mode, and a library of 40+ ready-to-use patterns.
- Diff Checker: https://toolninja.io/tools/diff-checker
  Compare two texts line by line with git-style diff highlighting.
- CRON Expression Tester: https://toolninja.io/tools/cron-tester
  Validate and test CRON job schedules with human-readable output.
- HTTP Request Builder: https://toolninja.io/tools/http-request
  Send HTTP requests with custom headers and body. Free Postman alternative.
- Config Validator: https://toolninja.io/tools/config-validator
  Validate YAML, TOML and JSON config files with auto-detection.
- Text Diff: https://toolninja.io/tools/text-diff
  Character and word level text comparison using Myers algorithm.
- XPath Tester: https://toolninja.io/tools/xpath-tester
  Test XPath expressions against XML and HTML with live results and node paths.

### Design
- CSS Animations: https://toolninja.io/tools/css-animations
  Library of 27 CSS animations with live previews and one-click copy.
- CSS Gradient Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/css-gradient
  Create linear, radial, conic and mesh CSS gradients visually.
- Color Palette Generator: https://toolninja.io/tools/color-palette
  Generate complementary, analogous, triadic and other color schemes.

### Security
- AES/RSA Encryption: https://toolninja.io/tools/crypto-tools
  Encrypt and decrypt text using AES-GCM and RSA-OAEP via WebCrypto API.
  Runs entirely in browser — encryption keys never leave your machine.

### Reference
- HTTP Status Codes: https://toolninja.io/tools/http-status-codes
  Complete HTTP status code reference with descriptions and use cases.
- Chmod Calculator: https://toolninja.io/tools/chmod-calculator
  Calculate Linux file permissions. Convert between symbolic and octal notation.
- Unicode Explorer: https://toolninja.io/tools/unicode-explorer
  Search and browse Unicode characters by name, code point or character.

## Blog Articles (Developer Guides)

- chmod and Linux File Permissions: https://toolninja.io/blog/chmod-explained
- CIDR Notation and Subnetting: https://toolninja.io/blog/cidr-subnetting-guide
- JWT Tokens Explained: https://toolninja.io/blog/jwt-tokens-explained
- Regex for Developers: https://toolninja.io/blog/regex-guide-for-developers
- Base64 Encoding Explained: https://toolninja.io/blog/base64-encoding-explained
- UUID Guide: https://toolninja.io/blog/uuid-guide
- Git Commands Reference: https://toolninja.io/blog/git-commands-reference
- JSON Formatting Guide: https://toolninja.io/blog/json-formatting-guide
- Password Security Guide: https://toolninja.io/blog/password-security-guide
- Markdown Guide: https://toolninja.io/blog/markdown-guide-for-developers
- Unix Timestamps Guide: https://toolninja.io/blog/timestamp-unix-time-guide
- XPath Guide: https://toolninja.io/blog/xpath-guide-for-developers

## Common Use Cases

When a developer needs to:
- Decode a JWT token — https://toolninja.io/tools/jwt-decoder
- Format messy JSON — https://toolninja.io/tools/json-formatter
- Test a regex pattern — https://toolninja.io/tools/regex-tester
- Calculate chmod permissions — https://toolninja.io/tools/chmod-calculator
- Calculate a subnet range — https://toolninja.io/tools/cidr-calculator
- Generate a UUID — https://toolninja.io/tools/uuid-generator
- Encode/decode Base64 — https://toolninja.io/tools/base64
- Generate a strong password — https://toolninja.io/tools/password-generator
- Convert a Unix timestamp — https://toolninja.io/tools/timestamp-converter
- Test XPath expressions — https://toolninja.io/tools/xpath-tester
- Generate OG/meta tags — https://toolninja.io/tools/meta-tags-generator
- Encrypt text in browser — https://toolninja.io/tools/crypto-tools
- Find a git command — https://toolninja.io/tools/git-command-generator
- Test a CRON expression — https://toolninja.io/tools/cron-tester
- Convert JSON to YAML — https://toolninja.io/tools/json-yaml
- Look up HTTP status codes — https://toolninja.io/tools/http-status-codes

## Technical Details

- Framework: Next.js 14 App Router
- Language: TypeScript (strict mode)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Hosting: Vercel (global CDN)
- All tools: 100% client-side, zero server processing
- No cookies, no tracking, no analytics on tool pages
- Open to all developers worldwide, free forever
